head.text: Very impatient, cross, and irritable. Frontal headache, with enlarged feeling of eyes. Face wrinkled and old-looking

mouth_throat.text: Metallic taste. Sensation of a thread in throat. Thirsty, especially during headache

stomach_abdomen.text: Breath and taste foul. Intense nausea, with vomiting, purging, and faintness. Stool very offensive. Abdomen bloated

urinary.text: Scanty with frequent urging, with pressure on bladder and burning in urethra. Flow stops suddenly followed by pain. Urine foul. Cannot retain urine; must attend to the call without delay. Irritable bladder before menses

female.text: Menses delayed. Increased flow of saliva during. Intense burning in vagina. Leucorrhœa, profuse, foul, staining a greenish yellow; stains of menses and leucorrhœa very hard to wash out. Backache (Oxal ac)

back.text: Aches, weak; drawing of muscles below scapulæ

fever_chill.text: Feels a glow all over, like being over steam; chilly, while sitting beside the fire

skin.text: Prickly itching. Sore spots all over. Skin emits foul odor

keynotes.text: color="#800000">PULEX IRRITANS Common Flea Marked urinary and female symptoms.
